description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow should have multiple jobs: check-code-formatting, windows, ubuntu, and fedora. The check-code-formatting job checks code formatting in a container. The windows job builds on Windows, the ubuntu job builds on Ubuntu with a matrix of distros and compilers, and the fedora job builds on Fedora with a matrix of shared library configurations.
